name: Tobacco Tax Credit or Refund for Market Withdrawal or Casualty

eligibility.description: Available to manufacturers, importers, or export warehouse proprietors who provide satisfactory proof of tax payment and subsequent loss or withdrawal. Claims must be filed within 6 months of the event.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a credit or refund of excise taxes paid on tobacco products that are withdrawn from the market, lost (except by theft), or destroyed by fire, casualty, or act of God.
